flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 16 pp at Great Oaks Career Campuses vs the 2003–2007 baseline (60.6% vs 76.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Great Oaks Career Campuses fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (166 → 142).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Great Oaks Career Campuses fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Great Oaks Career Campuses are 36% above the public certificate-predominant peer median ($55.2k vs $40.5k).
